feedback:
The task asked to add a module-level docstring to `src/nubi/mcp/__main__.py`, but this docstring already exists on the base branch (`origin/main`). The current branch (`nubi/test-docs-mcp-entry-3`) does not introduce any changes to `src/nubi/mcp/__main__.py` - the only files changed are CI gate configuration files (`.nubi/test-docs-mcp-entry-3/gates.json`, `.nubi/test-docs-mcp-entry-3/result.json`, and `.nubi/test-docs-mcp-entry-3/review.json`).

The existing docstring on the base branch (since commit 80f1256) is:
```python
"""Entry point for running the Nubi MCP server as a module.

Usage:
    python -m nubi.mcp

The server will start on the port specified by NUBI_MCP_PORT environment
variable (default: 8080) using streamable HTTP transport.
"""
```

This docstring is correct and meets the task requirements. However, since no changes were made on this branch to add it (it was already present on main), the branch appears to be redundant.

The executor should either:
1. Remove the unnecessary CI configuration files and close/merge this branch
2. Acknowledge that no additional work is needed since the docstring was already added previously
summary: The target docstring already exists on the base branch. The branch only adds CI configuration files and makes no changes to src/nubi/mcp/__main__.py.

issues.description: The docstring already exists on main branch - no changes made on this branch
CI configuration files added but not relevant to the task - should be removed
